message:
perf(combinator): lazy avg_queue_wait_ms and SeqCst→Acquire relaxation

bulkhead.rs: Move avg_queue_wait_ms computation from process_queue()
(called on every grant) to metrics() (called on-demand).  The hot-path
grant code now only accumulates total_wait_time_ms atomically; the
float division happens lazily when metrics are actually read.  Also
adds clippy::cast_precision_loss allow on metrics() since the f64
cast of total_executed is intentional.

circuit_breaker.rs: Relax three state_bits loads from SeqCst to
Acquire.  The state word is a publish/subscribe signal (CAS loops
already use AcqRel); SeqCst was providing unnecessary total-order
synchronization.  Acquire is sufficient to observe the latest
published state transition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
